description: Composition Purple and white checked tunic top made of 100% cotton, with short puffed sleeves that have foldover hems, tipped collar, front buttoned placket, mid-back pleat, ruched on the waist sides and has a curved hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your feminity in style with this checked tunic top from jealous 21. The pleat at the mid-back and ruched sides enhances your curves where they need to be flaunted, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and heeled sandals for that final touch of feminity. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.8'', Chest-33”
